description.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的木纹纹理，具有同心年轮、正弦扰动木纹和节疤效果。
description.en: Generates tileable wood grain texture with concentric annual rings, sinusoidal perturbation for grain, and knot effects.

triggers.zh-Hans: 木材, 木纹, 年轮, 木板, 树木, 家具纹理
triggers.en: wood, wood grain, timber, plank, lumber, grain texture

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的木纹纹理，带同心年轮和节疤效果，适用于家具或建筑材质。
exampleUsage.en: Generates a tileable wood grain texture with concentric annual rings and knot effects for furniture or architectural materials.
